findings.message: The package-export issue is still understated as something that 'may need' fixing in the build plan. It is already a concrete package-surface defect: packages/ui/package.json only exports ./components/atoms/*, which maps @acme/ui/components/atoms/shadcn to dist/components/atoms/shadcn.js, but the built artifact is dist/components/atoms/shadcn/index.js. There is also a live repo consumer of the bare barrel path in MediaManager.test.tsx. The fact-find should treat the named export addition as required, not optional.

The recommendation to use tailwind.baseColor: 'neutral' is not evidenced by the document's schema audit. The brief lists valid style enum values but does not establish the accepted tailwind.baseColor values from the schema.

The dependency map says downstream apps import from @acme/ui/components/atoms/shadcn/*, but the repo also contains a bare barrel import of @acme/ui/components/atoms/shadcn in MediaManager.test.tsx. The inventory should mention both import shapes.

note: Round 3 (final). Score 8/10 = lp_score 4.0 (credible threshold met). All findings addressed in artifact.
